lmstudio-credential.description: A valid LM Studio credential must exist in ~/.adhd/agent-mcp/.env so the live [openai_compat_roundtrip] proof can source the key and actually exercise the box. (Rotation of the previously-leaked key is operational, NOT a plan gate — ADDENDUM §6; just ensure a working value is present here.)
lmstudio-credential.how_to_provide: Put the (current, rotated) LM Studio API key in ~/.adhd/agent-mcp/.env as LMSTUDIO_API_KEY=<value>. This file is gitignored; the key must never be committed.
